item.title: Trump Says US Is in No Rush, but 'Clock Is Ticking' for Iran
item.description: President Donald Trump said Thursday the United States is in no rush to end the war with Iran, but "the clock is ticking" for the Islamic republic, as...

item.title: Trump Praises Phelan After Sudden Exit as Navy Chief
item.description: President Donald Trump on Thursday praised John Phelan, who stepped down Wednesday as Navy secretary, saying he did "an outstanding job" helping rebui...

item.title: Dhillon to Newsmax: Va. Gun Laws Could Face DOJ Fight

item.title: Agriculture Secretary Mulls Biden Fertilizer Program
